_comment: MiniMax 声音库默认配置 - 与 Docker 启动时的硬编码配置一致
_usage: 可通过 VOICE_LIBRARY_CONFIG_PATH 环境变量指定此文件路径来覆盖默认配置

speeds._comment: 语速配置: voice_id -> speed，取值范围 [0.5, 2]

pitches._comment: 声调配置: voice_id -> pitch，取值范围 [-12, 12]

models._comment: 模型配置: voice_id -> model，可选值: speech-2.6-hd, speech-2.6-turbo, speech-02-hd, speech-02-turbo, speech-01-hd, speech-01-turbo

emotions._comment: 情绪配置: voice_id -> emotion，可选值: happy, sad, angry, fearful, disgusted, surprised, calm, fluent, whisper

volumes._comment: 音量配置: voice_id -> vol，取值范围 (0, 10]
